title: Smoky Pine Nuts Thai Stir-fry
description: A lazy Sunday dish featuring smoky pine nuts and a quick thai-style stir-fry that's perfect for making with minimal effort.
instructions: Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add pine nuts and fry until golden brown, about 3-5 minutes. Remove from pan and set aside.
In the same pan, add minced garlic and onion; sauté for 2-3 minutes until fragrant and slightly softened.
Add bell pepper and eggplant slices; stir-fry for another 2-4 minutes or until vegetables start to soften.
Return pine nuts to the pan. Add chili sauce (if using) and tomato paste, stirring well to combine with other ingredients.
Pour in soy sauce (vegan only), and continue to cook for an additional minute.
Stir in lemon juice and sugar; simmer for 1-2 minutes until the sauce thickens slightly.
Serve hot as a snack or side dish.
